title: Another coding plan to test and add to my collection 😎

content.summary: Another coding plan to test and add to my collection 😎 StepFun (@StepFun_ai) Step Plan is now live on StepFun Open Platform!! Affordable OpenClaw and coding, all month. What you get: ⚡ Step 3.5 Flash, fast inference on every tier. 🔧 Works with Cursor, Windsurf, Cline, and your own stack. Zero lock-in. 💰 Four tiers from $6.99/mo to $99/mo. 🔜 Multimodal flagship coming to the plan soon. Check it out at: platform.stepfun.ai/step-pla… — https://nitter.net/StepFun_ai/status/2035803648240889992#m
